message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 229 migrate 2 ambient cass client sites to cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Sixth cross-crate caller migration. Migrates 2 remaining ambient
CassClient calls in main.rs:

1. L18462 robot cass search: `client.search_with_cx(&cx, &query, &options)`
2. L18493 robot cass view/query: `client.query_with_cx(&cx, &path, line_number, &options)`

Both route through `CassClient::<method>_with_cx → run_with_cx →
timeout_with_cx` so the cass subprocess timeout binds to the
caller's cx (cass.rs L1049). A cx-cancel during the cass invocation
now surfaces as `CassError::Timeout` with the caller's cx attribution
instead of requiring the full configured timeout to elapse.

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern.

Combined with tick 227's `cass.status_with_cx` migration, all 3
ambient cass call sites in main.rs are now cx-first:
- robot cass search (this tick, L18462)
- robot cass view (this tick, L18493)
- robot cass status (tick 227, L18519)

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
